## Meeting Purpose

[Screening interview for the Operations | Account Strategist role.](https://fathom.video/share/Qs_bm4_Ch6nVaSd9qywUxXVm17SnJyys?tab=summary&timestamp=271.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Role:** Project Manager for 3–5 clients, ensuring deliverables and managing weekly calls. Content creation is handled by a Managing Editor using an internal AI platform.](https://fathom.video/share/Qs_bm4_Ch6nVaSd9qywUxXVm17SnJyys?tab=summary&timestamp=291.0)
  - [**Candidate:** 7–8 years in SEO/CSM (iProspect, Botify), managing up to 20 clients. Proven ability to save at-risk enterprise accounts (e.g., Macy's) via custom solutions and upsells.](https://fathom.video/share/Qs_bm4_Ch6nVaSd9qywUxXVm17SnJyys?tab=summary&timestamp=430.0)
  - [**Company:** Growthx is a profitable agency funding its internal AI platform, which will launch as a SaaS product in early 2026. The company is growing so fast it has a client waitlist.](https://fathom.video/share/Qs_bm4_Ch6nVaSd9qywUxXVm17SnJyys?tab=summary&timestamp=1329.0)
  - [**Fit:** Strong match on retention-based KPIs and scrappy culture. The primary challenge is the 12-hour time difference (Singapore vs. US clients), which the candidate is confident they can manage.](https://fathom.video/share/Qs_bm4_Ch6nVaSd9qywUxXVm17SnJyys?tab=summary&timestamp=1539.0)

## Topics

### Growthx: Model & Culture

  - [**Model:** Agency (organic blog content only) funding internal AI platform development.](https://fathom.video/share/Qs_bm4_Ch6nVaSd9qywUxXVm17SnJyys?tab=summary&timestamp=309.0)
  - [**Platform:** Proprietary tool (vs. Aerox) for AI-generated content drafts.](https://fathom.video/share/Qs_bm4_Ch6nVaSd9qywUxXVm17SnJyys?tab=summary&timestamp=1028.0)
  - [**SaaS Plan:** Launch platform as a standalone product in early 2026.](https://fathom.video/share/Qs_bm4_Ch6nVaSd9qywUxXVm17SnJyys?tab=summary&timestamp=1080.0)
  - [**Culture:** Fully remote, fast-paced, and scrappy due to rapid growth and a client waitlist.](https://fathom.video/share/Qs_bm4_Ch6nVaSd9qywUxXVm17SnJyys?tab=summary&timestamp=1417.0)

### Account Strategist Role

  - [**Function:** Project Manager and primary client contact.](https://fathom.video/share/Qs_bm4_Ch6nVaSd9qywUxXVm17SnJyys?tab=summary&timestamp=356.0)
  - [**Team:** Works with a Managing Editor (content creation) and Account Director (strategy).](https://fathom.video/share/Qs_bm4_Ch6nVaSd9qywUxXVm17SnJyys?tab=summary&timestamp=309.0)
  - [**Client Load:** 3–5 high-touch accounts, with weekly calls.](https://fathom.video/share/Qs_bm4_Ch6nVaSd9qywUxXVm17SnJyys?tab=summary&timestamp=394.0)
  - [**KPI:** Client retention (P0 priority).](https://fathom.video/share/Qs_bm4_Ch6nVaSd9qywUxXVm17SnJyys?tab=summary&timestamp=1209.0)
  - [**Skills:** CSM experience is primary; SEO knowledge is a major bonus.](https://fathom.video/share/Qs_bm4_Ch6nVaSd9qywUxXVm17SnJyys?tab=summary&timestamp=1142.0)

### Candidate: Joan Tay

  - [**Experience:** 7–8 years in SEO/CSM (iProspect, Botify).](https://fathom.video/share/Qs_bm4_Ch6nVaSd9qywUxXVm17SnJyys?tab=summary&timestamp=430.0)
  - [**Previous Role (Botify):** SEO Success Manager for 20 clients; platform expert.](https://fathom.video/share/Qs_bm4_Ch6nVaSd9qywUxXVm17SnJyys?tab=summary&timestamp=451.0)
  - [**Key Success:** Saved at-risk Macy's account by mediating custom JS solutions between the client and Product team, leading to an upsell.](https://fathom.video/share/Qs_bm4_Ch6nVaSd9qywUxXVm17SnJyys?tab=summary&timestamp=600.0)
  - [**Prioritization:**](https://fathom.video/share/Qs_bm4_Ch6nVaSd9qywUxXVm17SnJyys?tab=summary&timestamp=874.0)
    1.  [At-risk accounts.](https://fathom.video/share/Qs_bm4_Ch6nVaSd9qywUxXVm17SnJyys?tab=summary&timestamp=904.0)
    2.  [High-ARR accounts to manage higher risk and expand network.](https://fathom.video/share/Qs_bm4_Ch6nVaSd9qywUxXVm17SnJyys?tab=summary&timestamp=928.0)

### Logistics & Fit

  - [**Location:** Singapore.](https://fathom.video/share/Qs_bm4_Ch6nVaSd9qywUxXVm17SnJyys?tab=summary&timestamp=250.0)
  - [**Time Zone:** 12-hour difference from US clients.](https://fathom.video/share/Qs_bm4_Ch6nVaSd9qywUxXVm17SnJyys?tab=summary&timestamp=1539.0)
  - [**Candidate's View:** Confident in managing the schedule ("night owl").](https://fathom.video/share/Qs_bm4_Ch6nVaSd9qywUxXVm17SnJyys?tab=summary&timestamp=1539.0)
  - [**Cultural Fit:** Experience as the first APAC hire at a previous company aligns with Growthx's scrappy, fast-paced environment.](https://fathom.video/share/Qs_bm4_Ch6nVaSd9qywUxXVm17SnJyys?tab=summary&timestamp=1519.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Andi Bailey:** Advance candidate to the next interview stage.](https://fathom.video/share/Qs_bm4_Ch6nVaSd9qywUxXVm17SnJyys?tab=summary&timestamp=1617.0)
  - [**Joan Tay:** Prepare for the next interview.](https://fathom.video/share/Qs_bm4_Ch6nVaSd9qywUxXVm17SnJyys?tab=summary&timestamp=1617.0)
